OmniScript.description: PR1050558-210 - Clinician Contract Request: Shift Rates Clinician_ConfigureRates
OmniScript.name: Clinician ConfigureRates

omniProcessElements.name: ContractRate_CreateCPAandPCRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "ContractRate_CreateCPAandPCRecords", "integrationProcedureKey" : "ContractRate_CreateCPAandPCARecords", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "Err_RunningContext" : "Clinician_ConfigureRates", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContractId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP", "ContextId" : "%ContractId%", "Type" : "%STP_SelectTypeOfRate:TypeOfRate%", "lstRateCPAandPCA" : "%preventiveCareAgreement%", "lstclinicianandHPF" : "%SelectedRecord:HpfId%", "pncId" : "%SelectedRecord:pncId%", "ContractId" : "%ContractId%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "0", "condition" : "<>", "field" : "ListPCASize" } ] } }, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: IP_FetchAndCreateShiftRatesRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_FetchAndCreateShiftRatesRecords", "integrationProcedureKey" : "FacilityRate_CreatePreventiveCareAgreementRecords", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "ContextId" : "%ContractId%", "Rate" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:AddBonus:Rate%", "UnitOfMeasure" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:AddBonus:UnitOfMeasure%", "ListOfFacilityTitleIds" : [ { "value" : "%SelectedRecord:facilityTitleId%" } ], "typeOfRate" : "%STP_SelectTypeOfRate:TypeOfRate%", "ListOfType" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:Type%", "Notes" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:AddBonus:Notes%", "OverrideProhibited" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:OverrideProhibited%", "timeType" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:TimeType%", "dailyEncounterThreshold" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:DailyEncounterThreshold%", "dailyEncounterPayCap" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:DailyEncounterPayCap%", "targetPlanRate" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:TargetPlanRate%", "monthsProviderGuarantee" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:MonthsProviderGuarantee%", "monthsStartupGuarantee" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:MonthsStartupGuarantee%", "rVUMetricType" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:RVUMetricType%", "shifts" : "%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:ShiftType:SelectedShiftstRecsFC:selectedShifts%", "pncId" : "%SelectedRecord:pncId%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "field" : "TypeOfRate", "condition" : "=", "data" : "Bonus" }, { "field" : "BonusFlag", "condition" : "=", "data" : "true" }, { "field" : "STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:AddBonus:AddBonusCount", "condition" : ">", "data" : "0" } ] } }, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

SetValues1

childElements.name: AddBonusCount
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 2, "label" : "Formula1", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "COUNT(%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:Type%)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Notes
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 10, "label" : "Other Bonus Details", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "field" : "OtherBonusFlag", "condition" : "=", "data" : "true" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: OtherBonusFlag
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 2, "label" : "Formula1", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "EXISTS(%STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle:Type:label%,\"Other Bonus\")", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Rate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 4, "label" : "Rate", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : 0, "min" : null, "max" : null, "placeholder" : "", "allowNegative" : false, "hideGroupSep" : false, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "field" : "AddBonusCount", "condition" : ">", "data" : "0" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Optional if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "displayCurrencyCode" : false }

childElements.name: TextBlock1
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock1", "text" : "

Enter the bonus to the facility at which they are primarily working.

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }
